query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.businessName, c.isActive, c.serviceCount,
       COUNT(s.id) as actual_service_count,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN s.isTerminated = 0 OR s.isTerminated IS NULL THEN 1 END) as active_service_count
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.customerId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR c.businessName LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%KENSINGTON%' OR c.businessName LIKE '%KENSINGTON%'
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.businessName, c.isActive, c.serviceCount;
